mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO VCS_CHANGE_LOG ( CHANGE_LOG_ID, PROJECT_ID, VCS_TYPE, REVISION_NO, AUTHOR, CHANGED_AT, MESSAGE, CREATED_AT ) VALUES
( #{log.changeLogId,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.devtrace.manager.common.config.UuidTypeHandler}, #{log.projectId,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.devtrace.manager.common.config.UuidTypeHandler}, #{log.vcsType}, #{log.revisionNo}, #{log.author}, #{log.changedAt}, #{log.message}, #{log.createdAt} )

INSERT INTO VCS_CHANGE_FILE ( CHANGE_FILE_ID, CHANGE_LOG_ID, FILE_PATH, CHANGE_TYPE ) VALUES
( #{file.changeFileId,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.devtrace.manager.common.config.UuidTypeHandler}, #{file.changeLogId,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.devtrace.manager.common.config.UuidTypeHandler}, #{file.filePath}, #{file.changeType} )
